title: Senior Software Engineer - ISRO - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ISRO - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ISRO. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About ISRO:
ISRO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO!
